## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `bun test` passes
- [ ] `bun run build` passes
- [ ] Agent prompts updated if needed (check with `grep -r "call_omo_agent" src/agents/`)
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` / `ARCHITECTURE.md` / `README.md` updated if applicable
- [ ] No breaking changes to public API (or documented in CHANGELOG.md)
- [ ] New tests added for changed code
- [ ] Breaking changes: added changeset (`npx changeset`)
